# braintrustdata_tag (Resource)

Manages a Braintrust project tag.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "braintrustdata_project" "evaluation" {
  name        = "tag-example-project"
  description = "Project for tag resource examples"
}

resource "braintrustdata_tag" "priority" {
  project_id  = braintrustdata_project.evaluation.id
  name        = "priority"
  description = "Highlights high-priority traces and experiments"
  color       = "#ff0000"
}

output "tag_id" {
  value = braintrustdata_tag.priority.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The tag name.
- `project_id` (String) The project ID that owns the tag.

### Optional

- `color` (String) Color of the tag for UI display.
- `description` (String) The tag description.

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) The timestamp when the tag was created.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the tag.
- `position` (String) LexoRank position of the tag within the project.
- `user_id` (String) The ID of the user who created the tag.
